name: Mushrooms in Cream Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Clean mushrooms and slice in half if large. Pat dry.
2. Fry bacon in a large pan until lightly browned. Remove from pan and reserve.
3. Add the butter to the pan drippings.
4. Add onions; saute until lightly browned.
5. Add mushrooms; cook until tender, stirring often.
6. Stir in wine, salt, pepper, paprika, nutmeg, and mace.
7. Cover pan and cook over low heat for 15 minutes.
8. Turn off the heat. Add the cooked bacon, cream, and lemon juice.
9. Reheat until just warm.
10. Garnish with parsley and serve with noodles or dumplings.
